TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Cinkawyin == u siwkay niza Cinkawyin, upalaway nu Korea kanatal. namueneng i China katukuh cacay a bataan a mihca. sisa matineng musakamu nu China a kamu. 2012 mihca tahkal ciniza mipalaw ku "Lolita-idang" a iga. maala tu tabakiay a kawlah. 2016 a mihca, mipalaw aca tu"sinaadaay a Dietu", manamuh ku taw tu cinizaan. (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Kim Go-eun (born July 2, 1991) is a South Korean actress. She debuted in the critically acclaimed film A Muse (2012) where she won several Best New Actress awards in South Korea. She next appeared in the crime thrillers Monster (2014), Coin Locker Girl (2015) and Memories of the Sword (2015). Kim then extended her filmography to television where she played leading roles in the tvN dramas Cheese in the Trap (2016) and Guardian: The Lonely and Great God (2016-2017). u sulit nu Lipun „ā≠„É†„ÉĽ„āī„ā¶„É≥(ÍĻÄÍ≥†žĚÄ,Kim Go Eun,1991ŚĻī7śúą2śó• - )„ĀĮťüďŚõĹ„ĀģšŅ≥ŚĄ™. u kawlah niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ)
S.PHON: == ¶inkawjin == u siwkaj niza ¶inkawjin, upar~…ĺawaj nu kor…ôa kanatar~…ĺ. namu…ôn…ôŇč i ¶ńßina katukuńß ¶a ¶aj a bataan a mińß ¶a. sisa matin…ôŇč musakamu nu ¶ńßina a kamu. **** mińß ¶a tańßkar~…ĺ ¶iniza mipar~…ĺaw ku "r~…ĺor~…ĺita-idaŇč" a iga. maar~…ĺa tu tabakiaj a kawr~…ĺańß. **** a mińß ¶a, mipar~…ĺaw a ¶a tu"sinaadaaj a di…ôtu", manamuńß ku taw tu ¶inizaan. (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam kim go-…ôun (born *ur~…ĺj *, ****) is a soutńß kor…ôan a ¶tr…ôss. sńß…ô d…ôbut…ôd in tńß…ô ¶riti ¶ar~…ĺr~…ĺj a ¶ ¶r~…ĺaim…ôd fir~…ĺm a mus…ô (****) wńß…ôr…ô sńß…ô won s…ô*…ôrar~…ĺ b…ôst n…ôw a ¶tr…ôss awards in soutńß kor…ôa. sńß…ô n…ô*t app…ôar…ôd in tńß…ô ¶rim…ô tńßrir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôrs monst…ôr (****), ¶oin r~…ĺo ¶k…ôr girr~…ĺ (****) and m…ômori…ôs of tńß…ô sword (****). kim tńß…ôn …ô*t…ônd…ôd ńß…ôr fir~…ĺmograpńßj to t…ôr~…ĺ…ô*ision wńß…ôr…ô sńß…ô pr~…ĺaj…ôd r~…ĺ…ôadiŇč ror~…ĺ…ôs in tńß…ô t*n dramas ¶ńß…ô…ôs…ô in tńß…ô trap (****) and guardian: tńß…ô r~…ĺon…ôr~…ĺj and gr…ôat god (****-****). u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun ******(***,kim go …ôun,********* - )******. u kawr~…ĺańß niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u uzip niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***)
S.FORM: == Cinkawyin == u siwkay niza Cinkawyin, upalaway nu Korea kanatal. namueneng i China katukuh cacay a bataan a mihca. sisa matineng musakamu nu China a kamu. 2012 mihca tahkal ciniza mipalaw ku "Lolita-idang" a iga. maala tu tabakiay a kawlah. 2016 a mihca, mipalaw aca tu"sinaadaay a Dietu", manamuh ku taw tu cinizaan. (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Kim Go-eun (born July 2, 1991) is a South Korean actress. She debuted in the critically acclaimed film A Muse (2012) where she won several Best New Actress awards in South Korea. She next appeared in the crime thrillers Monster (2014), Coin Locker Girl (2015) and Memories of the Sword (2015). Kim then extended her filmography to television where she played leading roles in the tvN dramas Cheese in the Trap (2016) and Guardian: The Lonely and Great God (2016-2017). u sulit nu Lipun „ā≠„É†„ÉĽ„āī„ā¶„É≥(ÍĻÄÍ≥†žĚÄ,Kim Go Eun,1991ŚĻī7śúą2śó• - )„ĀĮťüďŚõĹ„ĀģšŅ≥ŚĄ™. u kawlah niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ)

(ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam kim go-…ôun (born *ur~…ĺj *, ****) is a soutńß kor…ôan a ¶tr…ôss. sńß…ô d…ôbut…ôd in tńß…ô ¶riti ¶ar~…ĺr~…ĺj a ¶ ¶r~…ĺaim…ôd fir~…ĺm a mus…ô (****) wńß…ôr…ô sńß…ô won s…ô*…ôrar~…ĺ b…ôst n…ôw a ¶tr…ôss awards in soutńß kor…ôa. sńß…ô n…ô*t app…ôar…ôd in tńß…ô ¶rim…ô tńßrir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôrs monst…ôr (****), ¶oin r~…ĺo ¶k…ôr girr~…ĺ (****) and m…ômori…ôs of tńß…ô sword (****). kim tńß…ôn …ô*t…ônd…ôd ńß…ôr fir~…ĺmograpńßj to t…ôr~…ĺ…ô*ision wńß…ôr…ô sńß…ô pr~…ĺaj…ôd r~…ĺ…ôadiŇč ror~…ĺ…ôs in tńß…ô t*n dramas ¶ńß…ô…ôs…ô in tńß…ô trap (****) and guardian: tńß…ô r~…ĺon…ôr~…ĺj and gr…ôat god (****-****). u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun ******(***,kim go …ôun,********* - )******. u kawr~…ĺańß niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u uzip niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***)
